claim: Cross-checker evidence confirms that YOLO demand evidence dispatch already supports WebFetch/WebSearch as external evidence with proper scope separation and validation.

evidence.summary: Cross-checker verified agent prompt explicitly instructs scope=external for WebFetch/WebSearch records
evidence.why: Confirms the primary contract preventing external evidence from being used as project facts.

evidence.summary: Cross-checker validated evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues function enforces scope declaration
evidence.why: Confirms validation enforces scope declaration before evidence can satisfy readiness.

evidence.summary: Cross-checker verified projectEvidenceBlockingIssues blocks project facts without project-scoped evidence
evidence.why: Confirms external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing-project factual claims.

evidence.summary: Cross-checker confirmed test coverage validates blocking behavior for external-only evidence
evidence.why: Test coverage proves the specified behavior already exists and works correctly.

evidence.summary: Cross-checker validated doctrine explicitly separates external research from project facts
evidence.why: Product documentation confirms external evidence is only for background research.

risks: If verification is wrong, maintainers might implement redundant features when the behavior already exists.

result.notes: Cross-checker provided 5 valid evidence records, all with proper scope=project, concrete paths and line numbers. No assumptions presented as facts. No missing data. Evidence fully supports the claim that the demand acceptance criteria are already met by existing implementation. Explorer failure does not block progress since cross-checker independently verified all claims.
